reviews.comment:
La circulación es complicada con la disposición de la rotonda. Deberían ordenarlo. Buenos sanitarios y buffet.

(Translated by Google)
Traffic is difficult with the roundabout's layout. They should improve it. Good restrooms and buffet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhazVyTVlREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación y con una ubicación muy cómoda para la carga tanto a la entrada como a la salida de carmen de arco por la ruta 7.
Excelente el servicio de full.
Y un punto no menor, EL AGUA PARA EL MATE ES GRATIS.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station with a very convenient location for refueling, both on the way in and out of Carmen de Arco on Route 7. The full service is excellent.

And importantly, the hot water for mate is free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbzdQTFJREAE
